# TaskFlow — Repo Blueprint

**Stack:** Go 1.22 · Gin · PostgreSQL 16 · Redis · Tigris (S3) · Fly.io  
**Generated by:** Repo Builder Agent (`/blueprint`)

---

## Directory Structure

```
taskflow/
├── cmd/
│   └── api/
│       └── main.go              # Entry point — wires router, DB, Redis, starts server
├── internal/
│   ├── config/
│   │   └── config.go            # Env var loading (envconfig), validation at startup
│   ├── middleware/
│   │   ├── auth.go              # JWT parse → inject *User into Gin context
│   │   ├── ratelimit.go         # Redis sliding window rate limiter
│   │   ├── requestid.go         # X-Request-ID injection
│   │   ├── workspace_member.go  # Verify workspace membership
│   │   └── workspace_admin.go   # Verify workspace admin role
│   ├── handler/
│   │   ├── auth.go              # POST /api/auth/*
│   │   ├── users.go             # GET/PATCH /api/users/me
│   │   ├── workspaces.go        # CRUD workspaces
│   │   ├── members.go           # Workspace members + invites
│   │   ├── boards.go            # CRUD boards
│   │   ├── tasks.go             # CRUD tasks + move
│   │   ├── comments.go          # Comments
│   │   ├── attachments.go       # Presign + delete
│   │   ├── activity.go          # Paginated + SSE stream
│   │   └── health.go            # /health/live, /health/ready
│   ├── service/
│   │   ├── auth_service.go      # Token generation, refresh rotation, HMAC tokens
│   │   ├── email_service.go     # Resend client with retry-go
│   │   ├── storage_service.go   # Tigris presign, delete, signed GET
│   │   └── activity_service.go  # Persist event + Redis publish
│   ├── db/
│   │   ├── postgres.go          # pgx/v5 pool initialisation
│   │   ├── redis.go             # go-redis/v9 client + gobreaker wrapper
│   │   └── query/               # sqlc-generated type-safe query functions
│   │       ├── users.sql.go
│   │       ├── workspaces.sql.go
│   │       ├── boards.sql.go
│   │       ├── tasks.sql.go
│   │       └── ...
│   ├── model/
│   │   └── models.go            # sqlc-generated Go structs (User, Task, etc.)
│   ├── crypto/
│   │   ├── aes.go               # AES-256-GCM encrypt/decrypt for PII fields
│   │   └── hmac.go              # HMAC-SHA256 token sign/verify
│   └── sse/
│       └── hub.go               # Redis pub/sub subscriber + Gin SSE fan-out
├── sql/
│   ├── schema/
│   │   └── *.sql                # CREATE TABLE DDL — sqlc source
│   └── queries/
│       └── *.sql                # SELECT/INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE — sqlc source
├── migrations/
│   ├── 000001_initial_schema.up.sql
│   ├── 000001_initial_schema.down.sql
│   └── ...                      # golang-migrate SQL files
├── test/
│   ├── integration/
│   │   ├── auth_test.go         # Auth flow integration tests (real Postgres)
│   │   ├── tasks_test.go
│   │   └── sse_test.go          # SSE connection + event delivery
│   └── testutil/
│       └── db.go                # Test DB setup/teardown helpers
├── Dockerfile                   # Multi-stage: golang:1.22-alpine → gcr.io/distroless/static
├── fly.toml                     # Fly.io app config — regions, scaling, health checks
├── sqlc.yaml                    # sqlc code generation config
├── .github/
│   └── workflows/
│       └── ci.yml               # CI pipeline
├── .gitleaks.toml               # Secret scanning rules
├── .env.example                 # All required env vars with descriptions
├── SECURITY.md
└── go.mod
```

---

## fly.toml

```toml
app = "taskflow-api"
primary_region = "iad"

[build]
  dockerfile = "Dockerfile"

[env]
  PORT = "8080"
  GO_ENV = "production"

[[services]]
  http_checks = []
  internal_port = 8080
  protocol = "tcp"

  [[services.ports]]
    handlers = ["http"]
    port = 80
    force_https = true

  [[services.ports]]
    handlers = ["tls", "http"]
    port = 443

  [services.concurrency]
    type = "requests"
    hard_limit = 500
    soft_limit = 400

  [[services.tcp_checks]]
    grace_period = "1s"
    interval = "15s"
    restart_limit = 0
    timeout = "2s"

  [[services.http_checks]]
    interval = "10s"
    grace_period = "5s"
    method = "get"
    path = "/health/ready"
    protocol = "http"
    timeout = "2s"

[[vm]]
  cpu_kind = "shared"
  cpus = 1
  memory_mb = 512
```

---

## Dockerfile (Multi-stage)

```dockerfile
# ── Build stage ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
FROM golang:1.22-alpine AS builder

RUN apk add --no-cache git ca-certificates tzdata

WORKDIR /app

COPY go.mod go.sum ./
RUN go mod download

COPY . .
RUN CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux go build -ldflags="-w -s" -o /app/server ./cmd/api

# ── Runtime stage ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
FROM gcr.io/distroless/static:nonroot

COPY --from=builder /etc/ssl/certs/ca-certificates.crt /etc/ssl/certs/
COPY --from=builder /usr/share/zoneinfo /usr/share/zoneinfo
COPY --from=builder /app/server /server

EXPOSE 8080
USER nonroot:nonroot
ENTRYPOINT ["/server"]
```

---

## Key Implementation Patterns

### JWT + Refresh Token (internal/service/auth_service.go)

```go
// GenerateAccessToken creates a 15-min RS256 JWT
func (s *AuthService) GenerateAccessToken(userID uuid.UUID) (string, error) {
    claims := jwt.MapClaims{
        "sub": userID.String(),
        "exp": time.Now().Add(15 * time.Minute).Unix(),
        "iat": time.Now().Unix(),
    }
    token := jwt.NewWithClaims(jwt.SigningMethodRS256, claims)
    return token.SignedString(s.privateKey)
}

// RotateRefreshToken issues a new refresh token and revokes the old one
func (s *AuthService) RotateRefreshToken(ctx context.Context, oldTokenHash string, userID uuid.UUID) (string, error) {
    raw := make([]byte, 32)
    if _, err := rand.Read(raw); err != nil {
        return "", err
    }
    newToken := base64.URLEncoding.EncodeToString(raw)
    newHash := sha256Hex(newToken)

    return newToken, s.db.RotateRefreshToken(ctx, db.RotateRefreshTokenParams{
        OldHash: oldTokenHash,
        NewHash: newHash,
        UserID:  userID,
        ExpiresAt: time.Now().Add(7 * 24 * time.Hour),
    })
}
```

### AES-256-GCM Email Encryption (internal/crypto/aes.go)

```go
func Encrypt(plaintext, key []byte) ([]byte, error) {
    block, err := aes.NewCipher(key)
    if err != nil {
        return nil, err
    }
    gcm, err := cipher.NewGCM(block)
    if err != nil {
        return nil, err
    }
    nonce := make([]byte, gcm.NonceSize())
    if _, err = io.ReadFull(rand.Reader, nonce); err != nil {
        return nil, err
    }
    return gcm.Seal(nonce, nonce, plaintext, nil), nil
}
```

### SSE Hub (internal/sse/hub.go)

```go
type Hub struct {
    redis *redis.Client
}

func (h *Hub) Subscribe(ctx context.Context, workspaceID string, w gin.ResponseWriter) {
    pubsub := h.redis.Subscribe(ctx, "activity:"+workspaceID)
    defer pubsub.Close()

    w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "text/event-stream")
    w.Header().Set("Cache-Control", "no-cache")
    w.Header().Set("Connection", "keep-alive")
    w.Header().Set("X-Accel-Buffering", "no")

    ch := pubsub.Channel()
    for {
        select {
        case msg, ok := <-ch:
            if !ok {
                return
            }
            fmt.Fprintf(w, "data: %s\n\n", msg.Payload)
            w.(http.Flusher).Flush()
        case <-ctx.Done():
            return
        }
    }
}
```

### Redis Rate Limiter (internal/middleware/ratelimit.go)

```go
func RateLimitMiddleware(client *redis.Client, limit int, window time.Duration) gin.HandlerFunc {
    return func(c *gin.Context) {
        key := "rl:" + c.ClientIP() + ":" + c.FullPath()
        now := time.Now().UnixMilli()
        windowMs := window.Milliseconds()

        pipe := client.Pipeline()
        pipe.ZRemRangeByScore(c.Request.Context(), key, "0", strconv.FormatInt(now-windowMs, 10))
        pipe.ZAdd(c.Request.Context(), key, redis.Z{Score: float64(now), Member: now})
        countCmd := pipe.ZCard(c.Request.Context(), key)
        pipe.Expire(c.Request.Context(), key, window)
        if _, err := pipe.Exec(c.Request.Context()); err != nil {
            c.Next() // fail open on Redis error
            return
        }

        if countCmd.Val() > int64(limit) {
            c.AbortWithStatusJSON(http.StatusTooManyRequests, gin.H{"error": "rate limit exceeded"})
            return
        }
        c.Next()
    }
}
```

### Email with retry-go (internal/service/email_service.go)

```go
func (s *EmailService) Send(ctx context.Context, to, subject, html string) error {
    return retry.Do(
        func() error {
            reqCtx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(ctx, 10*time.Second)
            defer cancel()
            _, err := s.client.Emails.SendWithContext(reqCtx, &resend.SendEmailRequest{
                From:    s.fromAddress,
                To:      []string{to},
                Subject: subject,
                Html:    html,
            })
            return err
        },
        retry.Attempts(3),
        retry.DelayType(retry.BackOffDelay),
        retry.Delay(1*time.Second),
        retry.MaxJitter(500*time.Millisecond),
        retry.Context(ctx),
    )
}
```

### Security Boundary Tests (test/integration/auth_test.go)

```go
func TestUnauthorizedAccess(t *testing.T) {
    // 401 — no token
    resp := httptest.Get(t, "/api/workspaces")
    assert.Equal(t, 401, resp.StatusCode)
}

func TestMemberCannotAccessAdminRoute(t *testing.T) {
    token := loginAs(t, "member@example.com")
    // 403 — member trying to delete workspace
    resp := httptest.Delete(t, "/api/workspaces/"+workspaceID, token)
    assert.Equal(t, 403, resp.StatusCode)
}

func TestAdminCanDeleteWorkspace(t *testing.T) {
    token := loginAs(t, "admin@example.com")
    resp := httptest.Delete(t, "/api/workspaces/"+workspaceID, token)
    assert.Equal(t, 204, resp.StatusCode)
}
```

## GitHub Actions CI (.github/workflows/ci.yml)

```yaml
name: CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    services:
      postgres:
        image: postgres:16-alpine
        env:
          POSTGRES_DB: taskflow_test
          POSTGRES_USER: taskflow
          POSTGRES_PASSWORD: taskflow
        ports: ["5432:5432"]
        options: >-
          --health-cmd pg_isready
          --health-interval 10s --health-timeout 5s --health-retries 5
      redis:
        image: redis:7-alpine
        ports: ["6379:6379"]

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with: { go-version: "1.22" }

      - name: Install tools
        run: |
          go install honnef.co/go/tools/cmd/staticcheck@latest
          go install github.com/securego/gosec/v2/cmd/gosec@latest
          go install -tags 'postgres' github.com/golang-migrate/migrate/v4/cmd/migrate@latest

      - name: Run migrations
        run: migrate -path ./migrations -database "$DATABASE_URL" up
        env:
          DATABASE_URL: postgres://taskflow:taskflow@localhost:5432/taskflow_test?sslmode=disable

      - run: go vet ./...
      - run: staticcheck ./...
      - run: gosec -quiet ./...
      - run: go test -race -coverprofile=coverage.out ./...
      - run: go tool cover -func=coverage.out

  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: test
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Build Docker image
        run: docker build -t taskflow-api .

  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: superfly/flyctl-actions/setup-flyctl@master
      - run: flyctl deploy --remote-only
        env:
          FLY_API_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.FLY_API_TOKEN }}
```

## .gitleaks.toml

```toml
[extend]
  useDefault = true

[[rules]]
  id = "fly-api-token"
  description = "Fly.io API Token"
  regex = '''FlyV1 [a-zA-Z0-9+/]{40,}'''
  tags = ["fly", "token"]

[[rules]]
  id = "resend-api-key"
  description = "Resend API Key"
  regex = '''re_[a-zA-Z0-9]{32,}'''
  tags = ["resend", "email"]

[[rules]]
  id = "jwt-private-key"
  description = "JWT RSA Private Key"
  regex = '''-----BEGIN (RSA |EC )?PRIVATE KEY-----'''
  tags = ["jwt", "key"]

[[rules]]
  id = "field-encryption-key"
  description = "Field Encryption Key"
  regex = '''FIELD_ENCRYPTION_KEY\s*=\s*[a-zA-Z0-9+/=]{32,}'''
  tags = ["encryption", "key"]
```

---

## sqlc.yaml

```yaml
version: "2"
sql:
  - engine: "postgresql"
    queries: "sql/queries/"
    schema: "sql/schema/"
    gen:
      go:
        package: "db"
        out: "internal/db/query"
        emit_json_tags: true
        emit_interface: false
        emit_exact_table_names: false
```

## .env.example

```bash
# Server
PORT=8080
GO_ENV=development

# Database
DATABASE_URL=postgres://taskflow:password@localhost:5432/taskflow?sslmode=disable

# Redis
REDIS_URL=redis://localhost:6379

# JWT
JWT_PRIVATE_KEY=<RS256 private key PEM — base64 encoded>
JWT_PUBLIC_KEY=<RS256 public key PEM — base64 encoded>

# Token Secrets
INVITE_SECRET=<32-byte random hex>
RESET_SECRET=<32-byte random hex>

# Encryption
FIELD_ENCRYPTION_KEY=<32-byte AES key — base64 encoded>

# Email (Resend)
RESEND_API_KEY=re_...
EMAIL_FROM=taskflow@yourdomain.com

# Storage (Tigris / S3-compatible)
AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID=tid_...
AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=tsk_...
AWS_ENDPOINT_URL_S3=https://fly.storage.tigris.dev
AWS_REGION=auto
S3_BUCKET_NAME=taskflow-attachments

# CORS
CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS=http://localhost:3000,https://taskflow.yourdomain.com

# Sentry
SENTRY_DSN=https://...@sentry.io/...
```
